    Nirav Lekinwala’s website

    Hello everyone!! Welcome to my page. I plan to use this website to descimate my thoughts, information about my research and science in general.

    Starting with my Educational background:

    I completed my Ph.D. from the Department of Chemical Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (Mumbai, MH India) in Feb 2024, under the guidance of Prof. Mani Bhushan and Prof. Chandra Venkataraman. My PhD focused on the development of a novel method for performing air pollution source apportionment better. My PhD was funded by the Ministry of Environment Forests and Climate Change under the project titled "National Carbonaceous Aerosols Program - CarbOnaceous AerosoL Emissions, Source Apportionment and ClimatE Impacts" (NCAP-COALESCE) inagurated by Dr. Harsh Vardhan in 2017.

    My Thesis is titled "Development of Unified Framework for Air Pollution Source Apportionment using Non-Negative Matrix Factorisation". Prior to joining IIT Bombay, I completed my B.Tech in Chemical Engineering from University Institute of Chemical Technology, North Maharashtra University (Name to Kavaytri Bahinabai Chaudhari North Maharashtra University after graduation).

    My Interests and Hobbies:

    I like coding with specific expertise in scientific computing using Python. I also plan to make some of the code available to everyone using this website. In addition to it, I enjoy trekking and some casual photography (I'll add some photos to this website's photography page). I am an avid music listner, specifically Bollywood melodies (I'll share link to some of my playlists on my Music Page). I enjoy reading (and writing 😜) and listening to Ghazal and Shyaris

    I plan to regularly add content to this page. Hope to see you soon.!!
